sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 12:30:00-05');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = event_time + INTERVAL '1 hour' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT extract('hour' FROM event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, extract('minute' FROM event_time) AS event_minute FROM test_timestamps WHERE extract('hour' FROM event_time) = 12;
